pain_points: Current chatbot hallucinating interest rates
No measurable way to track model regression after updates
Compliance team rejects AI deployments due to lack of audit trails
Searching through 50,000+ case files manually
Existing keyword search misses semantic context
Need a way to query internal PDF repository using natural language
General purpose LLMs don't understand specific protein folding terminology
Need a model that mimics the specific writing style of our internal lab reports
Performance on niche domain tasks is currently below 60% accuracy
Students getting incorrect answers to math problems from the AI tutor
We are afraid to launch because we can't quantify the 'safety' of the model
Need a benchmarking suite against our specific curriculum
Customer support agents spend 4 hours a day looking up return policies
Policies change weekly and the static FAQ is always outdated
Want an automated assistant that bridges the gap between our Notion docs and the customer
Need to detect highly specific zero-day vulnerability patterns in proprietary C++ code
Off-the-shelf models are too verbose and miss the subtle logic flaws
Want to train a smaller, faster model on our 10 years of vulnerability data
Doctors are spending too much time summarizing patient histories
We have thousands of electronic health records (EHR) that are underutilized
Need a system that pulls relevant patient history during a live consultation
AI-generated copy sounds too generic and 'robotic'
We need the AI to capture our specific brand voice and 'edgy' tone
Standard prompting isn't enough to maintain consistency across 1,000 ads
We have 5 different LLM providers and don't know which is best for routing tasks
Costs are spiraling because we use GPT-4 for everything
Need a framework to compare model performance vs. cost for our specific use case
Travel agents are overwhelmed by changing visa regulations in 190 countries
We need a 'single source of truth' bot that reads the latest government PDF updates
The info must be cited directly from the source document to ensure accuracy
